---
title: "8c: PCA of WHO SDGs"
subtitle: "Task C"
author: 
  - "AJ Smit"
---

```{r code-brewing-opts, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  comment = "R>", 
  warning = FALSE, 
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 4.5,
  fig.height = 2.625,
  out.width = "75%",
  fig.asp = NULL, # control via width/height
  dpi = 300
)

ggplot2::theme_set(
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 8)
)
ggplot2::theme_set(
  ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 8)
)
```

## Task C

Explain the [PCA of WHO SDGs](../PCA_SDG_example.qmd) code section-by-section in long-form text. Include also the reasoning/rationale behind each section.

<!-- ::: callout-important -->
<!-- ## Submission instructions -->

<!-- Submit a Quarto HTML document wherein you provide your answer by the deadline in the syllabus schedule. -->

<!-- Provide a **neat and thoroughly annotated** Quarto/HTML file which explains the analysis and code. -->

<!-- Please label the Quarto and resulting HTML files as follows: -->

<!-- -   `BCB743_<first_name>_<last_name>_Task_C.qmd`, and -->

<!-- -   `BCB743_<first_name>_<last_name>_Task_C.html` -->

<!-- (the `<` and `>` must be omitted as they are used in the example as field indicators only). -->

<!-- Failing to follow these instructions carefully, precisely, and thoroughly will cause you to lose marks, which could cause a significant drop in your score as formatting counts for 15% of the final mark (out of 100%). -->

<!-- Submit your Labs to me by email. -->
<!-- ::: -->

## Assessment Criteria

This Task is not formally assessed.
